summary: When customers hit issues in production, it can be an effort to locally reproduce them, especially when external sources are involved. The newly introduced workload capture & replay tooling records a Materialize instance’s state as well as…

title: God writes Haskell
summary: God famously does not play dice with the universe, but he seems to enjoy writing Haskell: Consider the wave-particle duality in quantum mechanics. Every particle behaves as a wave, as long as you haven’t interacted with it. title: Introduction to Metaprogramming in Nim
